title: Landing + nav integration

task.description: Update home page hero + CTA flows and wire Nav links across all pages. Ensure Login/Signup cross-links, nav shows session state and relevant actions, and every page is reachable from nav or CTAs.
acceptance_criteria: Home page shows hero text and primary CTA that routes to /generate when logged in+trained, else routes to /login or /train appropriately.
Nav contains links to Home, Train, Generate, History; active/disabled states reflect auth/training gating.
Login page links to Signup and Signup links to Login; both visible and functional.
When logged out, nav shows Login/Signup and protected links redirect to /login.
After logout from nav, session ends and subsequent attempts to visit protected pages redirect to /login.

definition_of_done: All routes reachable via nav or page CTAs
No broken links in app shell
ui_requirements: Home hero in Card: Title/Description + Button(default) CTA; secondary Buttons for Train/History when logged in. Nav: horizontal flex, Buttons as ghost links; show user email text-muted and Logout Button(destructive/ghost). States: loading skeleton for session check, error banner if session fetch fails.
